artifact_refs.description: Evidence-only notebook used to inspect the Rossmann data and freeze a plain-language shortlist before bank alignment.
Authoritative shortlist-to-bank mapping for the Rossmann human baseline.
Author notes for the Rossmann human baseline.
Run-level metadata for the Rossmann human baseline.
Links each selected bank action to notebook evidence or worksheet sections.

notes: Manual Rossmann TC1 baseline. The final selection keeps the store join, calendar scaffold, one closure strategy, one simple competition-distance repair, one encoding path, and the train-only leakage drop while stopping before competition-timing derivations.
